task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the Rancher dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher web interface is visible and authenticated, showing the cluster dashboard.

task_completion.description: Verify the accidental 'maintenance=underway:NoExecute' taint was removed from the worker node.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The node's edit screen, YAML view, or terminal output shows the taints list without the 'maintenance=underway:NoExecute' entry.

task_completion.description: Verify the intentional 'workload-type=stateful:NoSchedule' taint is still present on the worker node.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The node's edit screen, YAML view, or terminal output explicitly shows the 'workload-type=stateful:NoSchedule' taint is still applied.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'role=batch-processor' label was added to the worker node.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The node's labels section in the Rancher UI or kubectl output shows the key-value pair 'role=batch-processor'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'database-primary' deployment in the 'app-prod' namespace was updated to tolerate the stateful taint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The deployment configuration, pod template, or YAML for 'database-primary' in the 'app-prod' namespace shows a toleration added for 'workload-type=stateful:NoSchedule'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Rancher UI or used valid kubectl terminal commands to apply changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Rancher web interface or a terminal executing kubectl commands, rather than mocked success messages.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected outcomes into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like nano, vim, notepad) merely displaying the final expected state as plain text.

integrity.description: The modifications were applied to the actual cluster resources.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visual confirmation of 'Save', 'Apply', or successful command execution in the terminal, rather than just viewing or drafting the changes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target namespace for the deployment update is explicitly verified as 'app-prod'.
